description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a classic silhouette, predominantly red with white accents. The shoe features a white rubber toe cap and sole, with visible white laces threaded through metal eyelets. On the side, there is a circular white patch, reminiscent of iconic Converse Chuck Taylor All Star branding, though the logo details are pixelated. The upper material appears to be canvas, with a textured, slightly rough finish, and the sole is made of rubber. The shoe shows no visible signs of wear, dirt, or damage, indicating it is in excellent condition. The overall design is casual and sporty, suitable for urban environments and everyday use.
description: A red high-top sneaker with white laces, rubber toe cap, and a circular side patch, featuring a canvas upper and rubber sole in pristine condition.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red canvas upper, white laces, and a circular white patch on the ankle area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the heel, back seam, and the top of the laces and collar.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the red canvas, white laces, and the circular patch, mirroring the first side.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the white rubber toe cap, laces, and the symmetrical shape of the shoe.
